title: PAU Scout Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Scout Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website pau.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Scout Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years

salary_details.details: Fixed salary Rs.12506+800 EPF/ESI per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Scout Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Scout recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the PAU Scout recruitment is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Scout post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Scout post is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Scout position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed their 10+2 (intermediate) education to be eligible for the Scout post at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for the PAU Scout recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 100/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scout post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Scout post will receive a monthly salary in the range of Rs. 12506 to Rs. 13306, plus additional benefits like EPF/ESI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the PAU Scout recruitment?
faq.answer: The primary selection process for the Scout recruitment involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the verification of their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Scout position at Punjab Agricultural University is a contractual job. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Scout post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Scout post in this recruitment drive by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q9. How can I download the application form?
faq.answer: You can download the application form from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, which is pau.edu. Make sure to check the notification for the exact link or section.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form, along with all required documents, should be sent to the address specified in the official notification. It is recommended to use Speed Post or Registered Post.
